text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I join Fine Motion on a trip to "observe" the
shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, everyone sounds so lively! Do you think
there's a festival?!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Wow! A raffle!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And anyone can participate! Can I try, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pass Fine Motion the raffle ticket we received
when we bought some croquettes a short time
ago.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, sir. May I participate in your raffle?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Ah... Of course! P-please go right ahead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion gives the raffle machine's lever a
vigorous spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oooh!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: A hot spring vacation?! I'm so happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Japanese hot springs are great, right?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Sometimes I go to public baths with my
friends!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: We have bathtubs in the castle, of course, but I didn't know the true value of a relaxing soak until I came to Japan.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The best part is definitely the chance to speak
with many people from the dorms or around town.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I have no doubt that going to this hot
spring will be a splendid experience. When should
we—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I think it's actually best if I give this to you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: This coupon is only valid for a limited time, right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I may not be able to go. I'd rather you use it than
let it go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Good. Now, make sure you enjoy it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hm, hm. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion seems to have fully given up on the
idea of going on a hot spring vacation. However...
choice_data_list: Let's play the raffle again sometime.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hm?
choice_data_list:
Next time, I'll win the grand prize and give it to
you.

Next time, I'll win the grand prize and give it to
you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If that day comes, I'll make sure you take me with
you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no guarantee either of us can keep this
promise. However, I believe the day will surely
come.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh my! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it must be delicious if they deemed it
worthy of the "deluxe" label.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Let's hurry and eat it, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Delicious!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: This hamburger steak is so scrumptious!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's incredibly juicy even though we only barely
reheated it! I'm sure it must have been made using
a legendary culinary technique.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, could you summon the chef that made
this hamburger steak?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I have so many things I'd like to discuss with them.
My own chef could learn a lot, as well, so if it's no
trouble, I'd like to have a conference call.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm, yes, let's set up a place to dine together.
Captain?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Things are escalating rather quickly, but Fine
Motion appears quite pleased.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! There must be a whole field's worth of
carrots in here!
choice_data_list: I don't think we could finish them all in one go.
I don't think we could finish them all in one go.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm, you're right... but we need to be sure to eat
them while they're still at their tastiest.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh! Why don't we hold a potluck with everyone?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend A
text_block_list.text: Fine! The carrot cake's ready!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thank you! ...Mmm, it smells great! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend B
text_block_list.text:
My carrot salad is done too. Cooking really is just
so fun!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I know, right? ♪ I tried out something new
as well!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I call it... carrot ramen! It's piping hot, straight out
of the kitchen. ♪

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Wonderous! What a shiny carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Um, I'm really sorry... I can only give you one.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Why are you apologizing? The quality is
what's most important.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This carrot was grown with the utmost care—it's
like a single precious jewel. Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I accept it graciously. ♪

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: She's so dignified!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, would this count as a cheeky snack?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Here, you can have half, Trainer. ♪ Hehe, let's
see who can finish faster!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Bad luck!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
However, this was still a new experience for
me! ♪ I'll use each one gladly.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You're up next, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Then everyone in my security team... Oh, should I
invite my friends too?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Since we're here, I really want to see someone
win!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah, really? Oh well...
